tools.name: search_mcp_registry
tools.description: Find servers by keyword or name (e.g. 'weather', 'github', 'database'). Returns matching servers with their endpoint URL, transport type, and description.

tools.name: get_mcp_server_details
tools.description: Get full metadata for a specific MCP server by its reverse-DNS registry name (e.g. io.github.username/server-name). Returns all versions, remotes, packages, and tools.

tools.name: list_mcp_servers
tools.description: Browse all MCP servers in the registry with pagination. Use the next_cursor from the response to fetch subsequent pages.
